briefdescription.para: Enum for Worker Task Job Types.
Driver-specific callback triggered by the SPI ISR.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the HAL SPI handle that triggered the interrupt.
Pointer to a flag indicating if a context switch is required.

briefdescription.para: Low-level SD initialization to ready the card for SPI communication.

parameterdescription.para: Max time to wait for initialization.

briefdescription.para: Reads a single 512-byte block from the SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Max time to wait for the block.

memberdef.argsstring: (sd_handle_t *sd, uint32_t blockNum, const uint8_t *buffer, TickType_t timeout)
memberdef.name: SD_WriteSingleBlock

briefdescription.para: Writes a single 512-byte block to the SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Max time to wait for the write to finish.

briefdescription.para: Initializes RTOS resources and FatFs structures for the SD driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (sd_handle_t *sd, const char *filename, const char *data, TickType_t delay_ticks)
memberdef.name: USER_SD_Card_Write_Async

briefdescription.para: Non-blocking write that sends a request to the background worker.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the file to write to.
Time to wait for queue space if full.

simplesect.para: Returns SD_OK if the job was queued.

briefdescription.para: RTOS task that processes file system jobs from the queue.
